daemons.name: Idol of Mars
daemons.description: Once per turn, empower a unit: +4 STR / RNG / MAG for the encounter.

daemons.name: Idol of Minerva
daemons.description: Once per turn, empower a unit: +4 DEF for the encounter.

daemons.name: Idol of Mercury
daemons.description: Each turn, a coin flip: heads grants the full redraw.

daemons.name: Idol of Janus
daemons.description: Every turn, redraw up to two cards.
